```mjs title=main.mjs
import { __rspack_require } from "./runtime.mjs";
import * as __rspack_external_fs from "fs";

import { createRequire as __rspack_createRequire } from "node:module";
const __rspack_createRequire_require = __rspack_createRequire(import.meta.url);
// fs-promises


var external_fs_promises_default = /*#__PURE__*/__rspack_require.n(__rspack_external_fs.promises);// ./index.js


it('should support array-type module external with property access', async () => {
  const fs = __rspack_createRequire_require('fs')
  expect((external_fs_promises_default())).toBe(fs.promises)
})

export {};

```

```mjs title=runtime.mjs
// The require scope
var __rspack_require = {};

// webpack/runtime/compat_get_default_export
(() => {
// getDefaultExport function for compatibility with non-ESM modules
__rspack_require.n = (module) => {
	var getter = module && module.__esModule ?
		() => (module['default']) :
		() => (module);
	__rspack_require.d(getter, { a: getter });
	return getter;
};

})();
// webpack/runtime/define_property_getters
(() => {
__rspack_require.d = (exports, getters, values) => {
	var define = (defs, kind) => {
		for(var key in defs) {
			if(__rspack_require.o(defs, key) && !__rspack_require.o(exports, key)) {
				Object.defineProperty(exports, key, { enumerable: true, [kind]: defs[key] });
			}
		}
	};
	define(getters, "get");
	define(values, "value");
};
})();
// webpack/runtime/has_own_property
(() => {
__rspack_require.o = (obj, prop) => (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(obj, prop))
})();

export { __rspack_require };

```
